description: Legal document, perhaps Mamluk or early Ottoman-era, with a large and elaborate ʿalāma at the top. Some phrases are preserved including the blessings for the judge (ايد الله تعالى احكامه) and phrases regarding a debt owed (في ذمته بحق صحيح شرعي)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
